title: Marks & Spencer India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Marks & Spencer India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marks & Spencer India! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marks & Spencer India:
Marks & Spencer India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India!
